# 📜 Code of Conduct

We are committed to creating a welcoming and respectful community.

## Our Standards

- Be respectful.
- Be inclusive.
- Provide constructive feedback.
- Help others learn.
- Respect different opinions.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment
- Hate speech
- Personal attacks
- Spam
- Discrimination

Let's build an open and welcoming community together. ❤️
